title: Creating Your First Unreal Project
learningTarget: I can create and save a new Unreal Engine project using the correct class setup, project name, and starter content settings.

bellRinger.prompt: What kinds of digital worlds have you seen in games, movies, architecture, or VR?

vocabulary.definition: A real-time 3D creation tool used for games, film, visualization, and interactive media.
The launcher used to install and open Unreal Engine.
The startup window where users open recent projects or create new ones.
A project template that starts with minimal prebuilt content.
Sample assets that can be added to a new project for practice.
Unreal visual scripting used instead of writing C++ for many beginner interactions.

slides.title: Lesson 01 - Creating Your First Unreal Project

assignment.title: First Unreal Project Setup
evidenceRequired: Screenshot of project browser or open Unreal project
Screenshot or written confirmation showing correct project name

exitTicket: What setting should be enabled if we want starter assets available in the project?
